message:
test(replay): add proptest suites for replay determinism and diffing

Two new comprehensive property-based test suites:

proptest_replay_determinism.rs (648 lines): Property tests for the
deterministic replay validation system. Generates arbitrary replay
sessions with randomized event streams, kernel states, and decision
logs, then validates that:
- ReplayEquivalenceLevel ordering is consistent (Structural < Decision < Full)
- Identical replays achieve Full equivalence
- Mutated replays are detected at the appropriate equivalence level
- Round-trip serialization preserves equivalence assessments
- Edge cases: empty sessions, single-event sessions, max-length chains

proptest_replay_diff.rs (342 lines): Property tests for replay
structural diffing. Generates pairs of replay sessions and validates:
- Diff symmetry (diff(a,b) mirrors diff(b,a) in expected ways)
- Self-diff produces no changes
- Insert/delete operations are correctly identified
- Decision provenance differences are surfaced at appropriate levels

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
